violations.description: Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Boxes of plastic cups and paper roll towels were stored on the floor in the upstairs storage area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floor in the walk in cooler by the kitchen needs to be cleaned.

General equipment and utensils - Use limitations of certain materials. — --Material of food contact equipment/utensil did not meet durability characteristics or are a limited use material. A plastic portion cup was being used to scoop batter mix from a container on the counter.

Dispensing equipment - Design and construction. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not properly designed and/or constructed to prevent contamination. Drain lines for the soda guns in the bar run through ice used for serving drinks.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Laminate was missing from the front edge of the white shelf by the sprayer.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. The ice curtains on the ice machines need to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Gaskets on the reach in freezer in the kitchen need to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Boxes of 16 oz plastic cold cups were stored on the floor in the upstairs storage room.--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Plastic forks in the bucket by the kitchen window had the food contact surface facing the consumer.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
